description_long: This vending machine features a dual-compartment design, with one side dedicated to snacks and beverages and the other side possibly for hot drinks or food. The front panel is visually divided, with the left section displaying a large image of a woman and food items, and the right section showcasing a transparent window revealing an assortment of snacks and drinks. The machine is encased in a wood-textured frame, with the sides and top finished in a light, laminated wood pattern, while the back is mostly plain with visible ventilation grilles. The front includes a digital display, product selection buttons, a payment interface, and a product retrieval slot. The overall structure is boxy and robust, typical of urban vending machines found in public spaces. The machine's exterior combines metal, glass, and wood-like materials, giving it a modern yet utilitarian appearance.
description: A dual-compartment vending machine with a wood-textured frame, transparent snack display, digital interface, and visible branding on the front.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, showing a plain, wood-textured panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front of the vending machine, featuring a split design with a transparent snack display, digital interface, product selection buttons, payment system, and prominent branding.
description_view_2: The right side of the vending machine, similar to the left, with a plain, wood-textured panel and no visible interactive elements.
description_view_3: The back of the vending machine, mostly plain with a large vented panel and minimal detailing.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular digital display panel is located on the upper left section of the front, above the payment interface, showing illuminated content and possibly instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the left front side, featuring a card reader, bill acceptor, and possibly a coin slot, all grouped together below the display panel.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual product selection buttons is visible on the right front side, each labeled and aligned next to the transparent product window.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the bottom center of the front panel, beneath the snack and drink compartments, with a flap or door.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding is visible on the left front panel, including a large image of a woman, food items, and possibly a logo or text, occupying a significant portion of the upper section.
